title: One of China's top investors says finance, not AI, is the country's biggest bottleneck
summary_full: Finance would be China's weak point in a prolonged rivalry with the U.S. which has the world's deepest capital market, says Primavera Capital founder Fred Hu.
summary_public: Finance would be China's weak point in a prolonged rivalry with the U.S. which has the world's deepest capital market, says Primavera Capital founder Fred Hu.
